attributes.description: Driver regression tracking, Proton/Wine compatibility, audio health, and network quality per session.

embeddableConfig.content:
## Software Stack
Driver regression tracking, Proton/Wine compatibility, audio health, and network quality per session. Use the filters to compare driver versions or Proton releases side-by-side. The compatibility matrix shows every game × Proton × driver combination tested. For CPU scheduler impact from a driver update, cross-reference with **[Engine & Diagnostics](/app/dashboards#/view/rigsignal-engine)**.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Graphics API Versions` = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.game.graphics_api)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Graphics API Versions` = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.game.graphics_api)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Upscaler Variants` = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.settings.upscaler.tech)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Upscaler Variants` = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.settings.upscaler.tech)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Kernel Versions` = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.os.kernel)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Kernel Versions` = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.os.kernel)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.frame-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Peak Avg FPS` = MAX(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.frame-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Peak Avg FPS` = MAX(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Total Sessions` = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Total Sessions` = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.audio-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Audio Backends` = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.audio.backend)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.audio-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Audio Backends` = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.audio.backend)

embeddableConfig.title: Average FPS over Time by Graphics API (5-minute buckets)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.frame-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_fps = AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minute), rigsignal.game.graphics_api
| SORT `BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minute)` ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.frame-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_fps = AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minute), rigsignal.game.graphics_api
| SORT `BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minute)` ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.frame-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_fps = AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s) BY rigsignal.game.graphics_api
| SORT avg_fps DESC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.frame-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_fps = AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s) BY rigsignal.game.graphics_api
| SORT avg_fps DESC

embeddableConfig.title: Average FPS and 1% Low FPS by Game (Top 15)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.frame-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_fps = AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s), p1_fps = MIN(rigsignal.fps.low_1pct) BY rigsignal.game.name
| SORT avg_fps DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM metrics-rigsignal.frame-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_fps = AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s), p1_fps = MIN(rigsignal.fps.low_1pct) BY rigsignal.game.name
| SORT avg_fps DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS session_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id) BY host.os.kernel
| SORT session_count DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS session_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id) BY host.os.kernel
| SORT session_count DESC
| LIMIT 15

embeddableConfig.title: Average FPS by Game and Graphics API

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.frame-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_fps = AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s) BY rigsignal.game.name, rigsignal.game.graphics_api
| SORT rigsignal.game.name ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.frame-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_fps = AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s) BY rigsignal.game.name, rigsignal.game.graphics_api
| SORT rigsignal.game.name ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Session Count Over Time by Audio Backend (1-Hour Buckets)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.audio-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS session_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 hour), rigsignal.audio.backend
| SORT `BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 hour)` ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.audio-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS session_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 hour), rigsignal.audio.backend
| SORT `BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 hour)` ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.audio-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS session_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id) BY rigsignal.audio.backend
| SORT session_count DESC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.audio-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS session_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id) BY rigsignal.audio.backend
| SORT session_count DESC

embeddableConfig.title: Average Network Bytes Received vs Sent per Second (5-minute buckets)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.network-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_recv = AVG(rigsignal.network.bytes_recv_per_sec), avg_sent = AVG(rigsignal.network.bytes_sent_per_sec) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minute)
| SORT `BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minute)` ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.network-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_recv = AVG(rigsignal.network.bytes_recv_per_sec), avg_sent = AVG(rigsignal.network.bytes_sent_per_sec) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minute)
| SORT `BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minute)` ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Average Network Bytes Received and Sent per Second — Top 10 Games

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.network-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_recv = AVG(rigsignal.network.bytes_recv_per_sec), avg_sent = AVG(rigsignal.network.bytes_sent_per_sec) BY rigsignal.game.name
| SORT avg_recv DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-rigsignal.network-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS avg_recv = AVG(rigsignal.network.bytes_recv_per_sec), avg_sent = AVG(rigsignal.network.bytes_sent_per_sec) BY rigsignal.game.name
| SORT avg_recv DESC
| LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.title: Sessions — Game, Graphics API, Upscaler, Features, Frame Gen, Preset, OS

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND rigsignal.game.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP rigsignal.session.id, rigsignal.game.name, rigsignal.game.graphics_api, rigsignal.settings.upscaler.tech, rigsignal.settings.features_active, rigsignal.settings.frame_gen, rigsignal.settings.preset, host.os.kernel, host.os.version, @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 500

FROM metrics-rigsignal.session-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND rigsignal.game.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP rigsignal.session.id, rigsignal.game.name, rigsignal.game.graphics_api, rigsignal.settings.upscaler.tech, rigsignal.settings.features_active, rigsignal.settings.frame_gen, rigsignal.settings.preset, host.os.kernel, host.os.version, @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 500

attributes.title: RigSignal: Software Stack
